name: Golf Shots
address: 155 Carpenter Dam Rd Suite E, Hot Springs, AR 71901
about: Golf Shots is an indoor golf simulator facility in Hot Springs, AR, offering 24/7 access to players of all levels. The venue combines cutting-edge simulator technology with a relaxed, private atmosphere and year-round comfort, providing an accessible option for practice, competition, and coaching regardless of weather conditions. Memberships are available for individuals, groups, and coaches, featuring flexible scheduling options and state-of-the-art equipment for effective training and play.
why_golfers_like_it: Accurate launch-monitor data and high-definition simulation
